data.revised_prompt: photorealistic cinematic Japanese drama film still, environmental storytelling, professional book-summary video visual, warm natural light, quiet emotional realism, realistic lived-in details, 35mm lens, 16:9, no readable text. Scene 06/8, Ferry journey. Primary instruction: wide ferry deck shot; grey-blue sea, railings, wind, distant island silhouette; the woman stands alone near the railing holding a wrapped wooden box; her body is full length or half length, the deck and sea are important. Visible character rule: one East Asian woman, early 30s, short black bob haircut, cream cardigan, white top, dark skirt; exactly one visible person, never a close-up portrait, never looking directly at camera. Emotional theme: journey from shop life toward the island and the past. Blank paper only, no readable words.
